body.title: DESIGNED: Swarm port-use audit — enumerate and rationalize bindings under unified bus
body.result: Audit doc at lab/design_docs/swarm-port-audit-20260505.md. All bindings mapped: 5432/PG, 6379/Redis, 8080/8082/UC, 10143/IMAP bus, 11434/Ollama, plus infra ports. 3 conflict flags (PG external, Ollama external, web_server stub). Commit f7df1ab3.
body.description:
Enumerate all current port bindings and service addresses on the swarm (UC web server, Discord bridge, Matter shelf, SensorTree, tailnet, CC dashboard) and produce a rationalization plan for how each fits under the unified agent_datacenter bus.

**Affected files:** lab/design_docs/ (new audit doc), agent_datacenter/config/device_config.py, lab/claudecode/cc_skills context if anything conflicts
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** IN — enumerate every bound port/service, map each to its datacenter device or flag as needing one, note conflicts. OUT — actually rationalizing/changing any bindings (that's T-swarm-identity-layer and siblings).
**Test plan:** audit doc is the deliverable; review against live `ss -tlnp` and `netstat` output from each online swarm box.
**Pass condition:** A written audit doc exists at lab/design_docs/swarm-port-audit-YYYYMMDD.md mapping every current binding to: (a) its datacenter device, (b) its proposed bus address, or (c) a conflict flag. No ports are left unmapped.
